productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Adi Jumble Grey Flip Flop
description: Make your lazy days all the more cool with  these ADI Jumble slippers from adidas. At the beach or at the mall, stay comfortable in these soft cushy slippers that come with a strong, grippy outsole. Look your casual best in this pair with shorts and a crew neck tee.UpperSynthetic thong straps with textile lining for snug Fit and protection from abrasionTextile toe separator to avoid blistersMidsoleFoam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for durability and tractionshoe careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
